name: Chocolate Tofu Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Nonfat sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
Coat a 10-inch glass pie pan with three sprays of vegetable oil.
Combine the tofu, ricotta cheese, cream cheese, maple syrup, cocoa powder, egg whites, cinnamon, and liqueurs in the bowl of a food processor. Puree until smooth and pour into the prepared pie pan.
Place the pie pan on the center rack of the oven. On the bottom rack, place a baking pan filled halfway with water. Bake for 1 hour.
While the cake is baking, combine all the ingredients for the topping in a small bowl and whisk thoroughly. When the cake has cooked for an hour, remove it from the oven, spread the topping on evenly, and decorate if desired. Return it to the oven. Bake for an additional 10 minutes until the topping sets.
Refrigerate for 2 hours before serving. Decorate with the Chocolate Sauce Design.
